item.title: Ann Droid - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Sue’s son buys his mother a robot as a present to help her live independently.

item.title: BBC Proms - 2026: First Night of the Proms
item.description: The world’s greatest classical music festival gets under way at the Royal Albert Hall.

item.title: Austin - Series 2: 1. We'll Always Have Northampton
item.description: Austin and Julian’s DNA test results show that Julian isn’t Austin’s dad after all.

item.title: The Traitors Canada - Series 3: Episode 1
item.description: Host Karine Vanasse’s 22 invited guests arrive at the manor.

item.title: The Great British Sewing Bee - Series 12: Episode 1
item.description: The nation’s favourite sewing competition returns with 12 brand new sewers.

item.title: I, Jack Wright - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Following an unexpected death, businessman Jack Wright's will shocks all the family.

item.title: The Sentinels - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: WWI. A French soldier is picked to join a top-secret army research project.

item.title: The Hairdresser Mysteries - Series 1: 1. Storm in a Teacup
item.description: Hairdresser Lily Petal investigates a suspicious death and the theft of an antique.

item.title: What the Fury?! - Series 1: 1. Gadgets
item.description: Tommy loves gadgets. John hates them. Is modern tech making us stupid?

item.title: I Kissed a Girl - Series 2: Episode 1
item.description: Dannii Minogue plays Cupid for girls who like girls, and it all starts with a kiss.

item.title: The Traitors US - Series 4: Episode 1
item.description: The Traitors are chosen, and the cards of fate are dealt.

item.title: Fake or Fortune? - Series 14: 1. Fabergé or Fauxbergé
item.description: If a flower in a shoebox is a Fabergé jewel owned by royalty, it could be worth a fortune.

item.title: Who Do You Think You Are? - Series 23: Toby Jones
item.description: Toby Jones investigates a family rumour of a connection to India on his dad’s side.

item.title: Evolution - Series 1: 1. The Elephant
item.description: How did the elephant get so big? We reveal how a tiny cell became a giant.

item.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
item.description: Gaining powers like his hero Spider-Man puts teen Miles in danger, but he is not alone.

item.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
item.description: Peter must prove himself as an Avenger while also managing his everyday teenage life.

item.title: Hunting The Spycammers
item.description: Jess Davies goes undercover in the dark online world where hidden camera footage is traded

item.title: The Tech Billionaire Takeover
item.description: Matt Shea meets the new tech billionaires trying to reshape the world.

item.title: Panorama - Dubai: Is the Dream Over?
item.description: How the Iran war has tested Dubai's promise of security and prosperity like never before.

item.title: Expert Witness - Series 5: 1. Intent to Kill: The Ashley Dale Murder
item.description: A ballistics expert makes a solid case for murder after a young woman is shot dead.

item.title: Goolagong - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Evonne debuts at Wimbledon, having come a long way from her Barellan roots.

item.title: Dear England - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: With the England team at an all-time low, Gareth Southgate becomes the new manager.

item.title: Two Weeks in August - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: On a Greek holiday with family and friends, can Zoe’s marriage survive the first night?

item.title: Good Bad Billionaire - Beyoncé: The Business of Queen B
item.description: How Beyoncé went from talent show tween to music mogul.

item.title: GK Barry: Toxic Gossip
item.description: GK Barry investigates one of the UK’s most notorious gossip forums.

item.title: Scamanda - Series 1: 1. Stage 1: Perfect Wife, Perfect Life
item.description: Amanda is given a devastating cancer diagnosis but inspires thousands with her blog.

item.title: The Mother of All Cons - Series 1: 1. I Smell a Rat
item.description: Suspicions grow about a new celebrity-backed charity for sick children.

item.title: Top of the Pops - The Story of 2000
item.description: Top of the Pops officially enters the new millennium.

item.title: Twenty Twenty Six - Series 1: 1. Semi-Finals
item.description: Ian joins the oversight team. His first challenge: which cities will host the semi-finals?

item.title: Schitt's Creek - Series 1: 1. Our Cup Runneth Over
item.description: Conned by their accountant, the once-rich Rose family relocate to a rural town.

item.title: Cunk on... - Earth: 1. In the Beginnings
item.description: Philomena Cunk ponders mankind’s first moments.

item.title: Remembers... - Mackenzie Crook and Martin Freeman Remember… The Office
item.description: Mackenzie Crook and Martin Freeman share their memories of working on The Office.

item.title: The Office - Series 1: 1. Downsize
item.description: Brent learns that his branch of the paper merchants might be closed down.

item.title: Alan Partridge: Mid Morning Matters - Series 1: 1. Broth and Muppet
item.description: Alan takes on an exercise bike challenge and interviews a former commando.

item.title: I'm Alan Partridge - Series 1: 1. A Room with an Alan
item.description: Alan has one final meeting with the BBC to see if he can return to television.

item.title: Oppenheimer
item.description: J Robert Oppenheimer's race to develop the atomic bomb for the US before the Nazis.

item.title: Pretty Woman
item.description: An emotionally detached businessman hires a prostitute to be his companion for a week.

item.title: Elvis
item.description: An epic, big-screen spectacle that explores the life and music of Elvis Presley.

item.title: The Notebook
item.description: In the run-up to WWII, a young couple's relationship falls foul of class prejudice.

item.title: Pride and Prejudice
item.description: The Bennet daughters react in very different ways to the arrival of their new neighbour.

item.title: Anyone But You
item.description: Two exes pretend they are still a couple when they are unexpectedly reunited at a wedding.

item.title: The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare
item.description: A ragbag of unruly agents try to sabotage Nazi U-boats in west Africa during World War II.

item.title: SAS Rogue Heroes - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Creating the world’s most famous regiment begins with failure.

item.title: Snowfall - Series 1: 1. Pilot
item.description: A young small time dealer takes a leap into the cocaine game in 80s LA.

item.title: Kinahan: The True Story of Ireland’s Mafia - Series 1: 1. Birth of a Cartel
item.description: The story of the Kinahan cartel, one of the world’s most feared criminal organisations.

item.title: Louis Theroux - Behind Bars
item.description: Louis travels to California to spend two weeks in the notorious San Quentin State Prison.

item.title: Top Gear - Series 1: Episode 1
item.description: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and Jason Dawe are joined by Harry Enfield.
